task_query: Find high TEC intervals for midlat_europe in March 2024 with q=0.9

result.answer: High TEC intervals for midlat_europe in March 2024 (q=0.9) were detected using a threshold of 46.51710743801654 TECU. A total of 14 intervals were identified where TEC exceeded this threshold.
